name: Nextdoor API
description: The Nextdoor API provides access to Nextdoor's platform capabilities including advertising, content publishing, content display/search, and news partner integration. The Advertising API covers campaign management, ad groups, creatives, targeting, audiences, and reporting. The Content Publishing API enables third-party content distribution. The Content Display API provides search and discovery of local content.
